title: Inventory Extended
description:
📥 Adds 3 rows of player inventory!
Extends storage in a vanilla way.
body:
The default Minecraft inventory was designed when the game had far fewer items. Nowadays, it feels restrictive as it's quickly filling up with junk and making inventory management a hassle. Shulker boxes and bundles aren’t practical alternatives—they require constant placement, breaking, and micromanagement, disrupting the flow rather than improving it.
**Features:** - Expands the inventory in a vanilla way by adding 3 more slot rows - The extended inventory is usable in all in-game inventory screens - Works seamlessly with the `KeepInventory` game rule
**Notes:** - Vanilla `offHand` and `equipment` slot mappings are modified and may break mod-compatibility - Quick-SHIFT-Click sort may not sort to the expanded slots

**This is a WIP version and may contain other bugs and glitches! Use at your own risk!**

**Want to help improve the mod? Report any bugs by opening an issue on GitHub :)**
--- *Uninstalling the mod deletes your extra inventory and its contents permanently. I’m not responsible for lost items or data corruption. Back up your items/player data before removing or upgrading the mod or Minecraft version.*
